examples: He slept feverishly all afternoon and into the night.
For months, workers have been feverishly sprucing up Dili, Timor-Leste's scruffy capital.
Rebuilding, now feverishly under way, was slow to start, mainly because of delays in insurance payouts.
TradeLog is working feverishly to issue an update that makes it easier for you, too.
